data.acceptance:
1. RESOLVED_STEP_MAP and the bare-state resolveStep(state) function are removed from src/lib/workflows.ts; any replacement consumes the workflow descriptor and contains no SDLC state-name literals.
2. src/lib/terminal-manager.ts#resolveSessionAgent has exactly one code branch that works identically for SDLC, gate, explore, and any future workflow — no conditional on prepared.resolved, no workflow-type special case.
3. The dispatch path derives its pool key as workflow.queueActions[beat.state] and looks up settings.pools[<that key>] as the sole source of agent selection.
4. getFallbackCommand is deleted. Every former call site either resolves through the unified pool path or throws.
5. When dispatch cannot resolve an agent (missing pool, empty pool, no matching registered agent), the code throws an Error that halts session creation; server log gets an ANSI-red banner console.error block naming the beat id, state, workflow id, derived pool key, and remediation; the session buffer receives a matching stderr banner event; the message contains the literal phrase "FOOLERY DISPATCH FAILURE".
6. src/lib/terminal-manager-take-agent.ts#selectStepAgent uses the same unified helper; no duplicated branching or WorkflowStep-enum-driven pool lookups.
7. src/lib/settings-orchestration.ts#resolveStepAgent (and resolveStepFromPool) are deleted or refactored to call the unified helper; no silent-fallback paths remain.
8. /Users/cartine/foolery/CLAUDE.md gains a "Fail Loudly, Never Silently" section prohibiting ?? default / || fallback on configured resources and requiring red-banner hard failures; /Users/cartine/foolery/AGENTS.md adopts the same rule if it exists.
9. Tests that previously asserted silent-fallback behavior are rewritten to assert the hard failure (throws, message contains "FOOLERY DISPATCH FAILURE"); at least one new test covers gate dispatch for state ready_to_evaluate selecting only from [[pools.evaluating]].
10. bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all pass clean.
11. Final commits are pushed to origin/main (no PR workflow).
12. Live smoke against the user's ~/.config/foolery/settings.toml: a session created for a beat in ready_to_evaluate reports an agentCommand containing "claude" or "codex" per [[pools.evaluating]], never "opencode".
